message:
fix(pt-redact): Improve entropy test with higher-entropy string

Update high entropy detection test to use a string with special
characters to reliably exceed the 4.5 entropy threshold. The previous
test string "aB3cD4eF5gH6iJ7kL8mN9" had entropy ~4.39 which was
below threshold.

Also updates workspace and beads tracking for completed redaction
engine implementation (process_triage-k4yc.1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
